wiki.summary: “When Did You Get Hot?“ is a song by Sabrina Carpenter, from her seventh album, "Man’s Best Friend". It was written by Sabrina Carpenter, Jack Antonoff, John Ryan and Amy Allen. The song is about the astonishment of seeing a former acquaintance who has undergone a significant makeover and now looks extremely attractive. Sabrina starts being obsessive towards this person realizing how much they have changed over time, from forgettable and awkward to irresistibly appealing. Read more on Last.fm.
